Hi, we’re WHOA, a boutique, women-powered adventure company, with big dreams. We believe traveling is about being changed, and being the change you want to see in the world. Our passion is designing sustainable adventures that help women reach new peaks, in the mountains we climb (hello Kilimanjaro!) and beyond. We believe travel, when done right, has a ripple effect that will transform you and the world!

sections.text: THE WHOA WAY
STAND STRONG We’re an inclusive community that knows we are stronger and unstoppable TOGETHER. We lift each other up & celebrate our differences. We do more than climb mountains—we move them!

DREAM BIG We’re woman powered and we empower women. Working with female guides & business owners around the world creates a ripple effect that strengthens communities & brightens the future for all of us.

PRIORITIZE PEOPLE All of our partners are small grassroots organizations just like us. Supporting local keeps resources directly where they belong, & creates more meaningful, authentic connections for everyone!

A note from WHOA Co-FoundersWhen we started WHOA, we were two young women looking for more out of life than the grind of New York City. We had no idea that our Kilimanjaro-sized dream would change our lives so much, or that it would take on a life of its own and evolve into the strong community of adventurous women it is today! A lot has changed since the beginning days, but so much has stayed true to our foundation. Our curiosity, passion and willingness to learn is still there and growing. We

desktop.bodyText:
Hi, we’re WHOA, a boutique, women-powered adventure company, with big dreams. We believe traveling is about being changed, and being the change you want to see in the world. Our passion is designing sustainable adventures that help women reach new peaks, in the mountains we climb (hello Kilimanjaro!) and beyond. We believe travel, when done right, has a ripple effect that will transform you and the world! 

VIEW ALL ADVENTURES




LOOK WHO'S TALKING







THE WHOA WAY

STAND STRONG


We’re an inclusive community that knows we are stronger and unstoppable TOGETHER. We lift each other up & celebrate our differences. We do more than climb mountains—we move them!

DREAM BIG


We’re woman powered and we empower women. Working with female guides & business owners around the world creates a ripple effect that strengthens communities & brightens the future for all of us.

PRIORITIZE PEOPLE


All of our partners are small grassroots organizations just like us. Supporting local keeps resources directly where they belong, & creates more meaningful, authentic connections for everyone!




A NOTE FROM WHOA CO-FOUNDERS


When we started WHOA, we were two young women looking for more out of life than the grind of New York City. We had no idea that our Kilimanjaro-sized dream would change our lives so much, or that it would take on a life of its own and evolve into the strong community of adventurous women it is today! A lot has changed since the beginning days, but so much has stayed true to our foundation. Our curiosity, passion and willingness to learn is still there and growing. We still operate from our hearts, and believe that there’s a bigger purpose and meaning in the adventures we take. We think you ended up here, reading this, for a reason. We’re honored and ready to be by your side on your journey, and to have you beside us on ours! Together, we’re unstoppable!


LET'S CONNECT





ADVENTURE@WHOATRAVEL.COM
+1 347-354-7888



JOIN US

Even inboxes need a dose of the great outdoors! 
Get on our list for the inside scoop on all our adventures.

 LET'S DO THIS!

AS FEATURED IN



ABOUT WHOA

UPCOMING ADVENTURES

PRIVATE TRIPS

REVIEWS

FAQ

SUSTAINABILITY


🏳️‍⚧️🏳️‍🌈
WHOA is an inclusive organization that proudly embraces all self-identifying women and non-binary travelers, of all sexual orientations. We strive to be allies of underrepresented communities in the outdoors and to create a space where everyone feels welcome. We're dedicated to creating sustainable travel experiences and protecting the places we love to explore.
Learn more about OUR BELIEFS and SUSTAINABILITY INITIATIVES.
LEGAL STUFF
R-E-S-P-E-C-T WE RESPECT YOUR PRIVACY
WHOA and the globe logo are the trademarks of Women High On Adventure and WHOA Travel, LLC. All rights reserved.
